recommended_runtime.notes: Anomaly-only profile: only fires on clearly aged / oxidized / cracked / corroded / damaged hose. Normal old hose, blue/green hose, and pure negative scenes are intentionally left empty.

metrics_on_reviewed_truth.comment: 7 reviewed-truth evaluation buckets covering both clean negatives and hard-case positives. F1 ranges 0.18 (hardest narrow-style bucket) to 1.00 (clean buckets).

training.regime: iterative anomaly-only fine-tuning with hard-case anchor injection
